top3.sql:
SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM (
    SELECT d.district_id
    FROM district d
    JOIN client c ON d.district_id = c.district_id
    JOIN account a ON c.district_id = a.district_id
    JOIN trans t ON a.account_id = t.account_id
    WHERE c.gender = 'F'
    GROUP BY d.district_id
    HAVING AVG(t.amount) > 6000 AND AVG(t.amount) < 10000
) AS subquery;

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM (
    SELECT d.district_id
    FROM district d
    JOIN client c ON d.district_id = c.district_id
    JOIN account a ON d.district_id = a.district_id
    JOIN trans t ON a.account_id = t.account_id
    WHERE c.gender = 'F' AND t.type = 'CREDIT'
    GROUP BY d.district_id
    HAVING AVG(t.amount) > 6000 AND AVG(t.amount) < 10000
) subquery;

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM (
    SELECT d.district_id
    FROM district d
    JOIN client c ON d.district_id = c.district_id
    JOIN account a ON c.district_id = a.district_id
    JOIN trans t ON a.account_id = t.account_id
    WHERE c.gender = 'F'
    GROUP BY d.district_id
    HAVING AVG(t.amount) > 6000 AND AVG(t.amount) < 10000
) AS subquery;

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM (
    SELECT d.district_id
    FROM district d
    INNER JOIN client c ON d.district_id = c.district_id
    INNER JOIN disp disp ON c.client_id = disp.client_id
    INNER JOIN account a ON disp.account_id = a.account_id
    INNER JOIN trans t ON a.account_id = t.account_id
    WHERE c.gender = 'F' AND t.type = 'PAYMENT'
    GROUP BY d.district_id
    HAVING AVG(t.amount) BETWEEN 6000 AND 10000
) AS result;

final.sql:
SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM (
    SELECT d.district_id
    FROM district d
    JOIN client c ON d.district_id = c.district_id
    JOIN account a ON c.district_id = a.district_id
    JOIN trans t ON a.account_id = t.account_id
    WHERE c.gender = 'F'
    GROUP BY d.district_id
    HAVING AVG(t.amount) > 6000 AND AVG(t.amount) < 10000
) AS subquery;
